description: The youngest cover figure of Aesperia's premier Business Weekly, the confirmed future heir of the Todd family, a business elite who is the focus of the business community. He's holding the influential media company "Auth Inc." and the top 3 social app "ECHO" in the Federation, earning the trust of many subordinates with his decisive and effective leadership... Such praises have never stopped echoing since Asurada joined Auth Inc.

trait.title: Dramatism
trait.description: Increase final damage by 18%.When equipped with Hellfire, increase flame damage by 14%.

attacks.title: Burning Sacrifice
attacks.description:
While on the ground, use normal attack to attack 5 times in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 78% of ATK plus 493.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 145% of ATK plus 916.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 278% of ATK plus 1,756.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 394% of ATK plus 2,488.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 418% of ATK plus 2,640.

attacks.title: Heavenly Fire
attacks.description:
While airborne, use normal attack to attack 4 times in a row in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 67% of ATK plus 423.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 124% of ATK plus 783.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 210% of ATK plus 1,326.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 496% of ATK plus 3,133.

attacks.title: Scorch the Land
attacks.description:
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to third normal attacks to spin ahead a short distance, dealing damage equal to 207% of ATK plus 1,307 and entering Anticipation state:
While in Anticipation state, release normal attack to trigger Rising Slash, dealing damage equal to 106% of ATK plus 669 to nearby targets and suspending targets midair as the Wanderer leaps into the air. After triggering Rising Slash, tap normal attack again to trigger Heavenly Fire.
After 1.2 seconds in Anticipation state, continue holding normal attack to trigger Turbulence, each slash consuming endurance and dealing damage equal to 42% of ATK plus 265 to nearby targets, spreading 25% of Turbulence's damage among targets when multiple are hit (damage is not spread if over 5 targets). During Turbulence, release normal attack to trigger Cross Slash, dealing damage equal to 246% of ATK plus 1,554 to nearby targets.

attacks.title: Executioner's Judgement
attacks.description:
While airborne, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to third normal attacks to trigger Executioner's Judgement.
Quickly land on the ground, dealing damage equal to 159% of ATK plus 1,004 to nearby targets.

dodges.title: Dodge
dodges.description: Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

dodges.title: Phantom Under the Blade
dodges.description:
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (tap an arrow button before dodging) to trigger Phantom Under the Blade, dealing damage equal to 186% of ATK plus 1,175 to targets ahead.
Hold normal attack instead of tapping it to also trigger Scorch the Land after Phantom Under the Blade.

dodges.title: Walking Through Fire
dodges.description:
Use normal attack right after dodging backward to trigger Walking Through Fire, shooting forward 2 sword auras that deal damage equal to 250% of ATK plus 1,579.
After triggering Walking Through Fire, tap normal attack to trigger the third attack of Burning Sacrifice.

dodges.title: Fanning the Flames
dodges.description:
Tap dodge twice to quickly dash forward, dealing damage equal to 333% of ATK plus 2,103 to targets ahead.
When in the Role Play state, Fanning the Flames is replaced with Up to the Skies: Quickly leap high into the air and draw in nearby targets, dealing damage equal to 394% of ATK plus 2,488 and suspending the targets in air, while all Afterimages also trigger Unstoppable Momentum once.
After triggering Up to the Skies, tap normal attack to trigger Falling Star Impact: Quickly land on the ground and deal damage equal to 418% of ATK plus 2,640 to nearby targets, while all Afterimages also trigger Unstoppable Momentum once.

dodges.title: Unstoppable Momentum
dodges.description: (DMG from the skill's effect and debuff triggered counts as normal attack damage.) While on the ground, hold dodge to start charging and release to trigger Unstoppable Momentum, dashing forward and dealing damage equal to 394% of ATK plus 2,488 to targets ahead. When using Unstoppable Momentum, every Afterimage on the field will unleash an additional Unstoppable Momentum attack toward the Wanderer, after which the Afterimages will quickly disappear. If the target is killed, duration of the Afterimage is reset and it can affect the next Unstoppable Momentum.

skills.title: Dream Within a Dream
skills.description:
Enter Flame Soul state, increasing final damage by 10% for 25 seconds. The Wanderer moves back, throws their weapon, and summons flame phantom slashes, dealing damage equal to 833% of ATK plus 5,261 to nearby targets. After the phantoms combine, the Wanderer dashes forward and attacks with the flame phantoms, dealing damage equal to 444% of ATK plus 2,804 to nearby targets launching them into the air. This has a cooldown of 25 seconds. The Wanderer also enters Role Play state for 21 seconds.
Role Play: In this state, the Wanderer gains hyperbody; when normal attack or dodge attack (excluding attacks that trigger Unstoppable Momentum) hits a target, the Wanderer generates an Afterimage that can perform a coordinate attack, dealing damage equal to 50% of the current attack's damage. Afterimages last for 30 seconds, with up to 5 able to exist on the field at any given time. Afterimages count as summons.

discharges.title: Deserved Death
discharges.description: When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, switching to this weapon from another removes all debuffs from the Wanderer and quickly charge an attack with three swords. After charging, perform a flurry of slashes in front, dealing damage equal to 1,173% of ATK plus 7,408 to all nearby targets and reducing the healing received of hit targets by 60% for 30 seconds. During this period, gain damage immunity for 1.5 seconds (unavailable in Apex League)

passives.title: Armor Dissolve
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts armor dissolve effect on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Fusion of Mass and Flame
passives.description: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the currently equipped weapon's highest physical/flame base ATK, the highest equipped physical/flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped physical/flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a physical and flame weapon.

passives.title: Physical Resonance
passives.description: Increase Physical ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Flame Resonance
passives.description: Increase Flame ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Blaze: On-Field:
passives.description: When hitting any target with Hellfire, deal damage equal to 256% of flame ATK plus 3.6% of Max HP plus 133% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 4.9% of crit to nearby targets. Can be triggered up to 1 time every 1.5 seconds. Blaze damage counts as normal attack damage. If any 1 frost or volt weapon is equipped, Blaze Damage is multiplied by 1.3. In addition, Blaze damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

advancements: Increase coordinated attack damage of Role Play to 100% of the damage of the damage dealt by the attack.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
For every 1 Afterimage on the field, increase the damage of Unstoppable Momentum by 10%. If there are 5 Afterimages on the field, increase the damage of Unstoppable Momentum to 100%.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
For every Afterimage consumed by triggering Unstoppable Momentum, Provide the Wanderer with a shield equal to 6% of Max HP for 30 seconds, up to 60%.
Increase final damage boost provided by Flame Soul to 33%.

matrices.pc2: Increase flame damage by 26% / 28% / 30% / 32% and Unstoppable Momentum multiplier to 525.4%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.
matrices.pc4: Increase all elemental damage by 16% / 18% / 20% / 22%. When equipped with Hellfire, increase final damage by an additional 16% / 18% / 20% / 22%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.

description: A cold-faced tech geek who tends to ignore everyone and only speaks at critical moments or when it's absolutely necessary to reply. She may come as rebellious, but once you get to know her, you'll see her gentle, inner world.[...]--Story Concept Card

trait.title: Anonymous Assault
trait.description: Increase final damage by 18%. When Benediction Resonance is active: Upon using Magic Transmutation at full Power Scale stacks, increase final damage of the Wanderer and nearby teammates by 10% for 30 seconds (this effect does not stack).

attacks.title: Magic Unleashed
attacks.description:
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 4 attacks in a row.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 270% of ATK plus 14 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 374% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 386% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 594% of ATK plus 31 to the target and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Each hit of Magic Unleashed adds 1 Temporal Fallacy stack to the target, decreasing all attack of the target by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times (this decrease will not be reflected on the Wanderer's stats).

attacks.title: Aerial Waltz
attacks.description:
While the Wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 270% of ATK plus 14 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 374% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back, gaining 1 Power Scale stack.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 386% of ATK plus 20 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 594% of ATK plus 31 to the target and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Each hit of Magic Unleashed adds 1 Temporal Fallacy stack to the target, decreasing all attack of the target by 3% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times (this decrease will not be reflected on the Wanderer's stats).

attacks.title: Fated Wheel
attacks.description:
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the third to fourth normal attacks to trigger Fated Wheel.
Deal damage equal to 1,000% of ATK plus 53 to nearby targets and knock the targets back.
After Fated Wheel hits, enhances Temporal Fallacy to decrease all attack of the target by 5% (this decrease is not reflected on the Wanderer's stats) and also inflict a 10% Slow effect for 10 seconds.

attacks.title: Glacial Surge
attacks.description:
Under the Witch of Time state, while on the ground, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 308% of ATK plus 16 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 452% of ATK plus 24 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 606% of ATK plus 32 and draw in the target, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 2,073% of ATK plus 109 to the target and launch the target, gaining 3 Power Scale stacks.

attacks.title: Frozen Comet
attacks.description:
Under the Witch of Time state, use normal attack to launch 4 consecutive attacks, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 308% of ATK plus 16 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 452% of ATK plus 24 and knock the target back, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 606% of ATK plus 32 and draw in the target, gaining 2 Power Scale stacks.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to up to 2,073% of ATK plus 109 to the target and launch the target, gaining 3 Power Scale stacks.

attacks.title: Stagnant Stream
attacks.description:
When under the Witch of Time state and with 12 Power Scale stacks, tap and hold normal attack or hold during normal attack on the ground to consume all Power Scale stacks and trigger Stagnant Stream, dealing damage equal to 2,095% of ATK plus 110 to nearby targets.
When Benediction Resonance is active:
Nearby teammates recover all HP lost in the past 3.5 seconds and additional HP equal to 200% of ATK. Also remove debuffs and control effects (including Graying Bite effect) from the Wanderer and nearby teammates.

attacks.title: Divebomb
attacks.description:
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using the Jetpack to trigger Divebomb.
While falling, deal damage equal to 306% of ATK plus 16 each hit. After landing, deal damage equal to 706% of ATK plus 37 to nearby targets.

dodges.title: Mystic Repulsion
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger a pre-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 625% of ATK plus 33 to targets ahead.

dodges.title: Retribution's Light
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger a post-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 600% of ATK plus 32 to targets ahead.

dodges.title: Airborne Fantasy
dodges.description: Hold dodge to enter Airborne Fantasy, increasing speed and continuously consuming endurance. Upon ending Airborne Fanatasy, deal up to damage equal to 858% of ATK plus 45 to targets ahead.

skills.title: Magic Transmutation
skills.description:
Consume all Power Scale stacks to deal damage equal to 2,093% of ATK plus 110 to nearby targets.
Enter the Witch of Time state, in which some normal attack modes change and the Wanderer increases frost damage by 1% for 30 seconds for each Power Scale stack consumed. While in this state, using Stagnant Stream grants a new skill, Sub-Zero Beam (only can be obtained and used 1 time in each Witch of Time state, and switching weapons during this state will prevent obtaining or using it). Cooldown of 30 seconds. (This is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects.)

skills.title: Sub-Zero Beam
skills.description: Can be used while in the Witch of Time state, dealing damage equal to 1,261% of ATK plus 66 to nearby targets and freezing them for 2 seconds. Also recover HP equal to 400% of ATK for nearby teammates and gain 12 Power Scale stacks.

discharges.title: Spacetime Spark
discharges.description:
When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer, gain 12 Power Scale stacks, and gain Hyperbody for 30 seconds, dealing damage equal to 4,500% of ATK plus 237 to nearby targets. During this period, gain damage immunity for 1.5 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).
When Benediction Resonance is active:
Remove debuffs and control effects (including Graying Bite) from the Wanderer and nearby teammates.

passives.title: Force Impact
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the targets' buffs. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Fusion of Frost and Volt
passives.description: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the highest equipped frost/volt base ATK, the highest equipped frost/volt ATK percentage, and the highest equipped frost/volt damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a frost and volt weapon.

passives.title: Frost Resonance
passives.description: Increase frost ATK by 15% and frost resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more frost weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Volt Resonance
passives.description: Increase volt ATK by 15% and volt resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more volt weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Magic Pool
passives.description: The wanderer can accumulate up to 12 power points, which can be used to enhance effects or unleash stronger charms. The power bar lasts for 60 seconds and disappears 15 seconds after leaving combat. Only the The Witch's Key has the power bar, and you can only accumulate power points if it is in the main slot.

passives.title: Chrono Coil: Release
passives.description: After using Magic Transmutation, deal damage equal to 137% of frost ATK plus 19.5% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 70% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 264% of crit to targets hit every second for 30 seconds. Release damage does not stack and Chrono Coil damage is counted as skill damage. If there is 1 flame/physical weapon of any kind equipped, Chrono Coil damage is multiplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Chrono Coil damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

passives.title: Reserve
passives.description: When The Witch's Key is in the main slot, can gain Power Scale to advance the clock progress of The Witch's Key, enhancing magic effects or releasing more powerful magic. Power Scale can stack up to 12 times, lasting for 60 seconds, and will be removed 15 seconds after exiting battle.

advancements:
Under the Witch of Time state and when The Witch's Key is in the main slot, gain an additional 1 stack of Power Scale every 1 seconds.
After using Magic Transmutation, apply an additional Reverse Tide effect to the hit target for 12 seconds, stacking up to 1 time. While Reverse Tide is active, the Wanderer recovers HP equal to the number of nearby targets number of nearby targets affected by Reverse Tide times 80% of ATK every 1 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Under the Witch of Time state, deal 775% of ATK as DMG to nearby targets every 1 seconds. When Benediction Resonance is active: Upon using Magic Transmutation at full Power Scale stacks, increase final damage of the Wanderer and nearby teammates by 25% for 30 seconds (this effect does not stack); in addition, targets affected by Reverse Tide will have their crit resistance reduced by 2% every 2 seconds for 10 seconds, up to 5 stacks.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Increase healing by 15%. For every 12 Power Scale stacks consumed, gain 1 stack of Exemption Privilege: When taking lethal damage, consume 1 stack to prevent the lethal effect and recover 15% of Max HP, stacking up to 4 times (unavailable in Apex League). When Benediction Resonance is active: Exemption Privilege can be additionally granted to nearby teammates.

Upon entering the Witch of Time state, the frost elemental damage boost increases to 2.5% for every 1 Power Scale stack consumed.
When Reverse Tide ends, deal additional damage equal to 50% of the total damage taken during this period to the target (does not exceed the Wanderer's ATK times 1,000 in solo mode and the Wanderer's ATK times 15,000 in team mode). Damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

matrices.pc2:
When non-Benediction Resonance is active, increase frost ATK by 24% / 26% / 28% / 30%.
When Benediction Resonance is active, increase all attack by 24% / 26% / 28% / 30%. Increase healing by 20%. When dealing damage for the first time in combat, gain 1000 weapon charge. This can only trigger once every 15 seconds. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.
matrices.pc4:
After using Spacetime Spark, increases Final Damage by 11% / 15% / 19% / 23%.
If Benediction Resonance is inactive, increases Frost Damage by 20%.
If Benediction Resonance is active, increases the Wanderer's and nearby allies' Crit Rate by 20% and Crit Damage by 12%. These effects last for 40 seconds. This set effect applies in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating takes effect.
